title: (fix): fix the status and the type of the quest issues opened
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Sorting the Hive
gist.blurb: We've updated our internal issue triage workflows to automatically categorize new quests as bugs, features, or tasks. Keeping the hive's to-do list neat and tidy!
gist.summary: Updated the GitHub Actions workflow for quest issues to automatically assign types (Bug/Feature/Task) and set the initial status to Todo.
gist.impact: Maintainers and contributors will see a better organized project board with automatically categorized issues.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot organizing a wooden quest board or bulletin board, placing colorful task cards (Bug, Feature, Task) into neat columns.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot organizing a wooden quest board with colorful pixelated task cards. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot organizing a wooden quest board with colorful pixelated task cards.
